summary: Tested Cost Centers CRUD API, Invoice approval requiring Kontierung, KostenstellenSection in Settings UI, and InvoiceActions approve button disable behavior. All 17 backend tests passed. All 4 frontend flows verified.

minor.issue: No authentication required to create cost centers (no Depends guard on the endpoint). Anyone can create cost centers without logging in.

action_items: Optional: Add auth guard (require_admin or require_accountant_or_above) to POST/PUT/DELETE /api/cost-centers endpoints if security is required
critical_code_review_comments: CostCenter model does not exclude MongoDB _id - but it's using Pydantic model_dump() which doesn't include _id since it's not in the model, so it works fine
GET /api/cost-centers correctly returns only active when include_inactive=false (default)
GET /api/cost-centers?include_inactive=true correctly returns all centers (active + inactive)
PUT /api/cost-centers/{id} correctly accepts JSON body with CostCenterUpdate model (not query params)
POST /api/invoices/{id}/approve correctly returns 422 with 'Genehmigung nicht möglich: Bitte zuerst eine Kontierung (Sachkonto) hinterlegen.' when account_number is not set
KostenstellenSection correctly imported and rendered in settings.tsx for admin users only
InvoiceActions correctly shows warning banner and 'Kontierung fehlt' locked button when account_number is missing
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted UI-TEST-INV-001 pending invoice for frontend InvoiceActions testing. All test data cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 P0 features verified: 1) Cost Centers CRUD fully working via API and UI. 2) Invoice approval returns 422 when account_number missing. 3) KostenstellenSection visible and functional in admin Settings page (scroll to y~4000 in RN ScrollView). 4) InvoiceActions shows warning + disabled 'Kontierung fehlt' lock-icon button when no account_number. Login: admin@candis-kopie.de / admin123. Bottom nav Einstellungen is at x~355, y~818. Bottom nav Rechnungen at x~98, y~810. Invoice list item clicks at y~185 for first item.

test_results.backend_get_active_only: PASS - GET /cost-centers returns only active centers
test_results.backend_post_create: PASS - POST /cost-centers creates new center with correct schema
test_results.backend_put_update_name: PASS - PUT /cost-centers/{id} updates name via JSON body
test_results.backend_delete: PASS - DELETE /cost-centers/{id} removes center, verified by GET
test_results.backend_approve_without_account_422: PASS - POST /invoices/{id}/approve returns 422 when account_number not set
test_results.backend_approve_with_account_200: PASS - POST /invoices/{id}/approve returns 200 when account_number set
test_results.frontend_kostenstellen_visible: PASS - KostenstellenSection visible for admin in Settings page
test_results.frontend_kostenstellen_create: PASS - 'Neu' button opens form, can create new Kostenstelle with success toast
test_results.frontend_kostenstellen_delete: PASS - Delete (trash) button removes Kostenstelle with 'Kostenstelle gelöscht' toast
test_results.frontend_invoice_kontierung_warning: PASS - InvoiceActions shows yellow warning 'Genehmigung gesperrt – bitte zuerst Kontierung (Sachkonto) hinterlegen.'
test_results.frontend_approve_button_disabled: PASS - Approve button shows lock icon + 'Kontierung fehlt' text when account_number is missing
